creator: gahr@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

From the gegl logs: 

2008-10-11  Sven Neumann  <sven@gimp.org> * G_DISABLE_SINGLE_INCLUDES 
from compiler flags as 
this breaks the build with glib 2.18 and gtk+ 2.12. 

and 

2008-12-31  ~Xyvind Kols  <pippin@gimp.org> * NEWS: Released GEGL 0.22 * 
configure.ac: updated to 0.22 

Could you please check whether the problem still exists with 0.0.22?
